flashcards.definition: Lines with equal slopes: m₁ = m₂ (and different y-intercepts).
Lines whose slopes are negative reciprocals: m₁ · m₂ = −1.
The point where the line crosses the x-axis; found by setting y = 0.
The point where the line crosses the y-axis; found by setting x = 0.
For Ax + By = C, the slope is m = −A/B.
